children.heading: .—Definition of Basic Research
children.label: a .—Definition of Basic Research
children.text: In this section, the term “basic research” has the meaning given the term in Office of Management and Budget Circular No. A–11.

children.heading: .—Coordination
children.label: b .—Coordination
children.text: The Administrator, the Director of the National Science Foundation, the Secretary of Energy, the Secretary of Defense, and the Secretary of Commerce shall, to the extent practicable, coordinate basic research activities related to physical sciences, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
